implementationSummary: Issue #425 fix pass: product_detail snapshot keys now include product_id (from performance payload or sync loop kwarg) preventing upsert collisions. LIVE A-28 poll wired via list_live_performance_all → expand_analytics_live_session → tiktok.analytics.live.raw with sync_state watermark after successful handoff. Prior shop/sku/product ETL + idempotent upserts unchanged.
assumptions: A-26 minute, A-27 live-product, and A-29 overview endpoints remain unwired — A-28 session list satisfies live grain handoff AC via expand_analytics_live_session
Bestselling A-38/A-39 responses are rank snapshots, not interval performance — excluded from analytics_performance_intervals
end_date_lt from poll window stored as end_date string on handoff rows for idempotency key alignment
risks: LIVE A-28 paths still rejected by production-read allowlist (#424) — Fujiwa poll may not call live APIs until allowlist updated
Large SKU/product catalogs may produce many detail handoffs per poll cycle under the 10/min rate limiter
Shop per-hour rows share grain=shop with daily rows but differ by hour_index in snapshot_key — consumers must filter by hour_index when querying
